source: FabNinjas_BrandGuidelines.pdf (page 3, 'Colours That Help Us Stand Out')
note: Hex values are authoritative (taken verbatim from the guidelines). Roles are derived from swatch prominence and observed usage in the source document, not an explicit spec.

tokens.name: ink
tokens.usage: Dominant colour (largest swatch). Logo, headings, body text, dark backgrounds.

tokens.name: orange
tokens.usage: The stand-out accent (enthusiasm). Fills, highlights, CTAs. Not for text on white.

tokens.name: purple
tokens.usage: Secondary accent: dividers, underlines, button fills (with white text).

tokens.name: mauve
tokens.usage: Soft supporting tint: section backgrounds, borders, muted UI.

tokens.name: cream
tokens.usage: Warm neutral (smallest swatch): page/background wash, cards. Pair with ink text.
